news.t: Resilience Meets Fragility: Rewriting the Diversification Playbook
Matt Bartolini Talks Inflation-Resilient Portfolios & More
State Street Global Advisors Expands Access to Bridgewater Associates' All Weather Asset Allocation Approach

overview.description: The State Street Bridgewater All Weather ETF (ALLW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund utilizes Bridgewaters All Weather strategy, diversifying across asset classes to manage risk and optimize returns in varying market conditions. The fund aims for long-term capital growth ALLW was launched on Mar 5, 2025 and is issued by State Street.
